MoreArmorBonuses_Rag_tooltip: The rags of your armor give you a slight boost.
MoreArmorBonuses_Leather_tooltip: Your leather armor is light and gives you the ability to move faster.
MoreArmorBonuses_Bronze_tooltip: Your armor is made of the sturdiest bronze and gives you boosts in return.
MoreArmorBonuses_Iron_tooltip: Attacks are reflected by your flashing iron armor.
MoreArmorBonuses_Wolf_tooltip: Your armor gives your the resilience of a wolf.
MoreArmorBonuses_Padded_tooltip: This armor is made of sturdy padded material, providing protection and resilience.
MoreArmorBonuses_Carapace_tooltip: The Seeker's carapace gives you a boost in health and armor.
MoreArmorBonuses_Flametal_tooltip: Your armor is made of the most powerful flametal, providing unparalleled protection and resilience.
